title: Dracorium Armor
description: A Minecraft Mod with a new Armor Set inspired by the Origin "Lost Draconian" by QuantumXenon.
body: A Minecraft Mod with a new Armor Set inspired by the Origin Lost Draconian by QuantumXenon. Which features a new material named Dracorium, which can be found as an ingot in End City chests and then can be crafted to a Block of Dracorium or the new Armor Set when fully worn grands Strength II.
